doc.description: Infineon DPS310 pressure sensor driver. The DPS310 is a high precision, low noise, and low power pressure sensor with an integrated temperature sensor. It can be used for altitude measurement.

configure.name: DPS310_I2C_PORT
configure.description: Select which i2c port the sensor is connected to (default i2c1)

define.name: DPS310_SYNC_SEND
define.description: flag to transmit the data as it is acquired
